2374680.name: Fantasy Grounds - FG Completed Maps Pack 3
2374680.description:
FG Completed Maps Pack 3

The Completed Maps Pack 3 features images and art produced by our in-house artist, Joshua Watmough. They have been organized and optimized for use with Fantasy Grounds Unity and the image tools. This map pack consists of 9 completed 25x25 maps that can be used on their own or combined to create a single massive seamless map. This map pack is also completely integrated and seamless when combined with Completed Maps Pack. This pack includes the following items:
  • 9 maps of various locations, including multiple ruins, a waterfall pit, and more. 
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Joshua Watmough
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
